intent: A small Python helper that computes the future value of a deposit under WEEKLY compounding (interest applied each week). Includes pytest tests with two reference scenarios.
features: compound interest weekly across N years
notes: Standard signature: compound_interest(principal: float, annual_rate: float, years: int) -> float. The annual_rate must be divided by 52 and compounded weekly (so the formula is principal * (1 + annual_rate/52) ** (52 * years)).
